### C# API Sketch

```csharp
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;
using System.Linq;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

public sealed class BenchmarkContext
{
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    
    public double Score(double[] values) => 
        values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
}

public record BenchmarkResult(
    BenchmarkContext Context,
    double Score,
    TimeSpan Duration,
    string LogPath,
    bool Success
);

public interface IDockerHarness
{
    Task<double[]> RunBenchmarkAsync(BenchmarkContext ctx, CancellationToken ct);
}

public class ResumableBenchmarkRunner
{
    private readonly IDockerHarness _harness;
    private readonly string _stateFile;
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _modelLock = new(1, 1); // Serializes model server access

    public ResumableBenchmarkRunner(IDockerHarness harness, string stateFile)
    {
        _harness = harness;
        _stateFile = stateFile;
    }

    public async Task<IReadOnlyList<BenchmarkResult>> RunAsync(
        IEnumerable<BenchmarkContext> contexts, 
        CancellationToken ct = default)
    {
        var completed = LoadCompletedIds();
        var pending = contexts.Where(c => !completed.Contains(GetId(c))).ToList();
        
        var results = new List<BenchmarkResult>();

        foreach (var ctx in pending)
        {
            if (ct.IsCancellationRequested) break;

            // Serialize access to the heavy model server
            await _modelLock.Wait
